completion.prompt: Machine learning systems improve by learning patterns from data rather than relying entirely on hand-written rules. In production systems, model serving quality depends on both throughput and numerical correctness. A bug in batching, tokenization, pooling, or output formatting can silently degrade results even when the service stays online. Summarize the main risk in one short paragraph:
Write one short sentence about Rust.

classify.input: Rust provides memory safety without a garbage collector.

input: Explain continuous batching in one sentence.
Summarize how embeddings are used in retrieval.

messages.content: Rank these passages by relevance to Rust ownership.
